name: Fix Your Credit Consulting
description_short: Fix Your Credit Consulting is a bonded credit repair company offering dispute services and credit score improvement with offices in California and nationwide service.
description_long:
Fix Your Credit Consulting operates as a credit repair consulting company with its main office in Studio City, California, and additional locations in San Francisco and San Diego. The company is fully bonded and positions itself as a top-rated provider in the credit repair space, with an emphasis on aggressive dispute tactics and client education.

The company's core service model involves reviewing clients' credit reports and developing customized fee structures based on individual situations. They promise results in as little as 45 days and offer free consultations, free credit report summaries, and free credit repair recommendations. Their approach combines dispute filing on behalf of clients with financial literacy coaching to help clients maintain good credit long-term. The company serves clients nationwide, not just California residents.

Fix Your Credit Consulting distinguishes itself through personalized, one-on-one relationships with credit consultants rather than automated services. Named consultants like Sandra, Jeff, and Raquel Yearwood appear frequently in client reviews, suggesting a relationship-based business model. The company has accumulated 236 reviews with a 4.9-star rating on their website. Pricing is described in reviews as affordable and performance-based, with clients reporting monthly fees around $110.

While the company maintains strong customer testimonials and claims of rapid credit score improvements (some clients report 54-point increases within days, bankruptcy removal in 30 days), these claims should be evaluated critically. Credit repair timelines depend heavily on creditor and bureau responsiveness, which varies significantly. The company's aggressive dispute approach is standard in the industry but outcomes are never guaranteed. Prospective clients should understand that credit repair is a legitimate but time-variable process, and results posted on their website may not be typical.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Fully bonded credit repair company with verifiable business registration
Free initial consultation, credit report summary, and repair recommendation with no upfront cost
Personalized one-on-one consultant relationships (not automated/outsourced service)
Customized fee structures based on individual credit situations rather than flat rates
4.9-star rating across 236 customer reviews with named consultant attribution
Nationwide service availability despite primary California office locations
Educational component focused on teaching clients how to maintain good credit long-term
Affordable monthly pricing reported around $110 in client reviews
cons: No pricing transparency on website—fees are determined after consultation only
Claims of 45-day results and rapid improvements (54 points, 30-day bankruptcy removal) may not be typical or guaranteed
No disclosure of success rates, average timelines, or statistics backing performance claims
Limited transparency on dispute methodology, industry regulations compliance, or FTC oversight disclosures
Website contains some off-topic/spam review content (Bitcoin, CreditVan references) suggesting review moderation issues
best_for: Consumers with multiple negative items (late payments, collections, charge-offs) seeking personalized dispute assistance
Clients willing to pay monthly fees in exchange for ongoing consultant relationships and monitoring
California residents who may prefer in-person consultations at Studio City, San Francisco, or San Diego offices
Individuals seeking credit education alongside dispute services to prevent future credit problems
diagnosis: Fix Your Credit Consulting is best suited for consumers with multiple negative credit items who value personalized consultant relationships and are willing to commit to monthly fees for ongoing dispute and monitoring services. The main caveat is that the company's published success claims (45-day results, significant score jumps) are not independently verified and likely represent best-case scenarios rather than typical outcomes; credit repair timelines depend on creditor responsiveness and cannot be guaranteed.
services: Dispute filing on behalf of clients
Negative item removal (late payments, collections, charge-offs, bankruptcies)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 4741 Laurel Canyon Blvd UNIT 205, Valley Village, CA 91607
